concerns.analysis: The output is missing a significant portion of the document. Specifically, pages 4-30 and page 35 are not present in the 'sections' array. This includes the Introduction, Section I (Purpose), Section II (Accomplishments), Section III (Action Plan), and Appendix B (Establishing Authority). While the JSON includes a key '_omitted' as a placeholder, the authoritative content from these pages is completely absent from the converted output.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 4 (NC OneMap intro), Page 5 (Contents), Page 6 (Introduction), Page 7 (Section I), Page 10 (Section II), Page 26 (Section III), Page 35 (Appendix B)
concerns.output_quote: The 'sections' array jumps from Page 3 (reading_order 26) to Appendix A (reading_order 274), and from Page 34 (reading_order 281) to Appendix C (reading_order 291).

concerns.analysis: There are two structural defects in the tables. First, for tables spanning multiple pages (Appendix A and Appendix C), the pipeline incorrectly designated the first data row on each new page as a header row (`is_header_row: true`) instead of data. Second, in Section 34, the 'Advisory Members' row contains only one cell while the table structure defines three columns, leading to a structural column count mismatch.
